Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

Interface ArrayVerifier<A,​E>

Type Parameters:
A - the type of the array
E - the type of elements in the array
All Superinterfaces:
ExtensibleArrayVerifier<ArrayVerifier<A,​E>,​A,​E>, ExtensibleObjectVerifier<ArrayVerifier<A,​E>,​A>
All Known Implementing Classes:
ArrayVerifierImpl, ArrayVerifierNoOp
public interface ArrayVerifier<A,​E>
extends ExtensibleArrayVerifier<ArrayVerifier<A,​E>,​A,​E>
Verifies the requirements of an array.

All methods (except those found in ExtensibleObjectVerifier) imply ExtensibleObjectVerifier.isNotNull().

  • Method Summary

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleArrayVerifier

    asCollection, asCollection, contains, contains, containsAll, containsAll, containsAny, containsAny, containsExactly, containsExactly, doesNotContain, doesNotContain, doesNotContainAll, doesNotContainAll, doesNotContainAny, doesNotContainAny, doesNotContainDuplicates, doesNotContainExactly, doesNotContainExactly, isEmpty, isNotEmpty, length, length

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleObjectVerifier

    asString, asString, getActual, isActualAvailable, isEqualTo, isEqualTo, isInstanceOf, isNotEqualTo, isNotEqualTo, isNotInstanceOf, isNotNull, isNotOneOf, isNotSameObjectAs, isNull, isOneOf, isSameObjectAs
